scopeAmendment.change: Scope widened from readiness/verification-only to explicitly cover doing the SaaS implementation and activation engineering work itself (tenant isolation, activation gates, related code), not just assessing or verifying readiness.
scopeAmendment.doesNotChange: commercialActivationState, saasReadinessMode, and activationEvidence in governance/saas/saas-governance.json are unaffected by this amendment. Each activationEvidence item still requires same-commit proof before it may move from NOT_PROVEN to PROVEN, and commercialActivationState may not move to ACTIVE without all of them proven plus the protected-domain approvals in governance/authority/single-owner-mode.json (tenant_isolation, security_approval, financial_control are excluded from owner self-approval).

notes: The user explicitly authorized SaaS activation, and on 2026-07-24 explicitly widened that authorization to cover implementation and activation work, not just readiness preparation. Production deployment remains a separate authorization and the final commercial ACTIVE state still requires same-commit evidence and independent approval of the protected domains listed in single-owner-mode.json.
